hero.subtitle: An exclusive subscription club connecting you to the world’s most profound art, philosophy, and cultural artifacts.

about.title: The Philosophy of the Frame
about.p1: We believe that a blank wall is a soulless home—much like a mind without art and philosophy.
about.p2: At Paspartu.co, we don’t just sell frames; we curate intellectual windows. Our name comes from the 'passe-partout' : The elegant space that protects a masterpiece while giving it focus and depth. To us, this space represents the clarity we seek in a noisy world.
about.p3: Every month, we select a theme, generate a unique artwork, and invite you to an intellectual assembly. Because your home should be a reflection of your mind: deep, curated, and alive.

philosophy.p1: In an age of noise, Paspartu offers silence. We curate a monthly dialogue between the great thinkers of the past and the vanguard artists of the present.
philosophy.p2: Your subscription grants you the community you need to design your life like a work of art.

membership.title: Membership
membership.subtitle: Choose your level of engagement.
membership.tier1_desc: Digital access to our weekly newsletter and public archives.
membership.tier2_desc: The full digital experience + monthly physical print.
membership.tier3_desc: Complete immersion. Lead the dialogue and shape the future.

founder.title: Founder’s Note
founder.p1: We created Paspartu.co for the seekers, the thinkers, and the quiet observers. In a world of fast consumption, we choose slow curation.
founder.p2: Every frame we send and every assembly we host is a step towards a more meaningful way of living. You aren't just a subscriber; you are a founding member of an intellectual collective.

footer.brand_desc: A curated sanctuary for the intellect. Art, Philosophy, and Culture delivered to your doorstep.
